  3. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)
  4. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)
  5. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)

  3. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @range(<args>)
  4. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @range(<args>)
  5. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @range(<args>)
typedb_typedb-behaviour concept/type/owns-annotations.feature · Inherited @values annotation on owns for <value-type> value type can be reset or specialised by the @values of not a subset of arguments

['entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)'
 'relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)'
 'entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)'
 'relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)'
 'entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)'
 'relation(description) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)'
 'entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

typedb_typedb-behaviour concept/type/owns-annotations.feature · Inherited @card annotation on owns for <value-type> value type can be reset or specialised by the @card of not a subset of arguments
  1. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)
  2. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)
  3. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)
  4. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)
  5. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)
  6. relation(description) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @card(<args>)
  7. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @card(<args>)
typedb_typedb-behaviour concept/type/owns-annotations.feature · Inherited @range annotation on owns for <value-type> value type can be reset or specialised by the @range of not a subset of arguments
  1. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @range(<args>)
  2. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @range(<args>)
  3. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @range(<args>)
  4. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @range(<args>)
  5. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @range(<args>)
  6. relation(description) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @range(<args>)
  7. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @range(<args>)
typedb_typedb-behaviour concept/type/owns-annotations.feature · Inherited @values annotation on owns for <value-type> value type can be reset or specialised by the @values of not a subset of arguments
  1. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @values(<args>)
  2. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) set annotation: @values(<args>)
  3. entity(person) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @values(<args>)
  4. relation(description) get owns(custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @values(<args>)
  5. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @values(<args>)
  6. relation(description) get owns(second-custom-attribute) set annotation: @values(<args>)
  7. entity(person) get owns(second-custom-attribute) get constraints contain: @values(<args>)

 'I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"'
 'I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"'
 'I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "0e30dab4c73bb453986e69517cd5a953"'
 'I should see a "Connection" header value "close"']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

Corvusoft_restq test/acceptance/features/client_side_identifiers.feature · Invalid queue key.
  1. I perform a HTTP "POST" request to "/queues" with headers "Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984":
  2. I should see a response status code of "400" "Bad Request"
  3. I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"
  4. I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"
  5. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"
  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "0e30dab4c73bb453986e69517cd5a953"
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"

  1. I perform a HTTP "POST" request to "/subscriptions" with headers "Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984":

  5. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"

Corvusoft_restq test/acceptance/features/client_side_identifiers.feature · Mixed case queue key.

  2. I should see a response status code of "200" "OK"

  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"

Canonical step text

['every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned'
 'at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"'
 'at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"'
 'a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored'
 'all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique'
 'all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique'
 'every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/create_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is created
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned
  2. at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  4. a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored
  5. all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique
  6. all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique
  7. every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired
local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/delete_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is deleted
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned
  2. at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  4. a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored
  5. all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique
  6. all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique
  7. every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired
local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/describe_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is described
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned

  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"

 'I should not see a "Trailer" header value']

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima però viene prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. request read('request.json')
  2. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })
  3. header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  4. header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  5. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  6. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDIntegrity/v1'
  7. header GovWay-TestSuite-PDND-RateLimiting = 'TestStandard';
  8. method post
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima viene invocata un'azione che non fa scaturire il download della chiave poi viene prelevata la chiave usando un'altra azione che prevede pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. request read('request.json')
  2. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingJWK', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingJWK' })
  3. header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingJWK'
  4. header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingJWK'
  5. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingJWK'
  6. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDIntegrity/v1'
  7. header GovWay-TestSuite-PDND-RateLimiting = 'TestMisto';
  8. method post

["def pdndClientJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_client_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])"
 'match pdndClientJson contains \'"consumerId":"\'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+\'-\'+formattedDateHHmm+\'-0002-aaaa-82e210e12345"\''

 "def tiderogazione = responseHeaders['GovWay-Transaction-ID-EROGAZIONE'][0]"
 "def result = get_diagnostico(tiderogazione, 'Verifica Policy di Rate Limiting (%) completata: rispettate(%), violate(%), violate-warningOnly(0), filtrate(%), nonApplicabili(0), disabilitate(0), inErrore(0).')"
 "match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'rispettate(1)'"
 "match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'violate(0)'"]

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima però viene prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. def pdndClientJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_client_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  2. match pdndClientJson contains '"consumerId":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0002-aaaa-82e210e12345"'
  3. match pdndClientJson contains '"id":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0002-bbbb-12345678f8dd"'
  4. def tiderogazione = responseHeaders['GovWay-Transaction-ID-EROGAZIONE'][0]
  5. def result = get_diagnostico(tiderogazione, 'Verifica Policy di Rate Limiting (%) completata: rispettate(%), violate(%), violate-warningOnly(0), filtrate(%), nonApplicabili(0), disabilitate(0), inErrore(0).')
  6. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'rispettate(1)'
  7. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'violate(0)'
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima viene invocata un'azione che non fa scaturire il download della chiave poi viene prelevata la chiave usando un'altra azione che prevede pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. def pdndClientJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_client_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  2. match pdndClientJson contains '"consumerId":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0003-aaaa-82e210e12345"'
  3. match pdndClientJson contains '"id":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0003-bbbb-12345678f8dd"'
  4. def tiderogazione = responseHeaders['GovWay-Transaction-ID-EROGAZIONE'][0]
  5. def result = get_diagnostico(tiderogazione, 'Verifica Policy di Rate Limiting (%) completata: rispettate(%), violate(%), violate-warningOnly(0), filtrate(%), nonApplicabili(0), disabilitate(0), inErrore(0).')
  6. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'rispettate(1)'
  7. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'violate(0)'
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, senza prima aver mai prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern ID_AUTH
  1. def pdndClientJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_client_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  2. match pdndClientJson contains '"consumerId":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0001-aaaa-82e210e12345"'
  3. match pdndClientJson contains '"id":"'+formattedDateYYYYMMDD+'-'+formattedDateHHmm+'-0001-bbbb-12345678f8dd"'
  4. def tiderogazione = responseHeaders['GovWay-Transaction-ID-EROGAZIONE'][0]
  5. def result = get_diagnostico(tiderogazione, 'Verifica Policy di Rate Limiting (%) completata: rispettate(%), violate(%), violate-warningOnly(0), filtrate(%), nonApplicabili(0), disabilitate(0), inErrore(0).')
  6. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'rispettate(1)'
  7. match result[0].MESSAGGIO contains 'violate(0)'

 'match pdndOrganizationJson contains \'"externalId":\'']

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdndApiV2.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima però viene prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. def clientIdID = get_id_by_credenziale('token_clientId','DemoSoggettoFruitore/ApplicativoBlockingIDA01')
  2. def pdndOrganizationName = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_org_name',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  3. match pdndOrganizationName == 'Comune di Esempio '+formattedDate+' ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  4. def pdndOrganizationJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_org_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  5. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"kind":"PA"'
  6. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"subUnitType":"AOO"'
  7. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"externalId":'
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdndApiV2.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima viene invocata un'azione che non fa scaturire il download della chiave poi viene prelevata la chiave usando un'altra azione che prevede pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND

  3. match pdndOrganizationName == 'Comune di Esempio '+formattedDate+' ApplicativoBlockingJWK'
  4. def pdndOrganizationJson = get_credenziale_by_refid_greather_then_id('pdnd_org_json',clientIdID,credenziale_max_feature['max_id_credenziale'])
  5. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"kind":"PA"'
  6. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"subUnitType":"AOO"'
  7. match pdndOrganizationJson contains '"externalId":'

Canonical step text

["path 'orders/pieces'" "param query = 'poLineId==' + poLineId"
 'method GET' 'status 200' 'match $.totalRecords == 1'
 'def piece = $.pieces[0]' 'def pieceId = piece.id']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

folio-org_folio-integration-tests acquisitions/src/main/resources/thunderjet/mod-orders/features/piece-audit-history.feature · First piece update
  1. path 'orders/pieces'
  2. param query = 'poLineId==' + poLineId
  3. method GET
  4. status 200
  5. match $.totalRecords == 1
  6. def piece = $.pieces[0]
  7. def pieceId = piece.id
folio-org_folio-integration-tests acquisitions/src/main/resources/thunderjet/mod-orders/features/piece-audit-history.feature · Second piece update
  1. path 'orders/pieces'
  2. param query = 'poLineId==' + poLineId
  3. method GET
  4. status 200
  5. match $.totalRecords == 1
  6. def piece = $.pieces[0]
  7. def pieceId = piece.id
folio-org_folio-integration-tests acquisitions/src/main/resources/thunderjet/mod-orders/features/piece-audit-history.feature · Second status update of piece
  1. path 'orders/pieces'
  2. param query = 'poLineId==' + poLineId
  3. method GET
  4. status 200
  5. match $.totalRecords == 1
  6. def piece = $.pieces[0]
  7. def pieceId = piece.id

 'the first "product" has the following attributes:'

 'I send a GET request to "/accounts/test1/arches"'
 'the response status should be "200"']

 'the current account has 1 "release" for the last "product"'
 'the current account has 3 "artifacts" for each "release"'

  3. the current account has 3 "artifacts" for each "release"
  4. the current account has 1 "policy" for the last "product"
  5. the current account has 1 "license" for the last "policy"
  6. I am a license of account "test1"
  7. I use an authentication token
keygen-sh_keygen-api features/api/v1/artifacts/index.feature · License retrieves artifacts for draft releases with a license for them
  1. the current account has 1 "product"
  2. the current account has 3 draft "releases" for the last "product"
  3. the current account has 1 "artifact" for each "release"
  4. the current account has 1 "policy" for the last "product"
  5. the current account has 1 "license" for the last "policy"
  6. I am a license of account "test1"
  7. I use an authentication token
keygen-sh_keygen-api features/api/v1/artifacts/index.feature · License retrieves artifacts for yanked releases with a license for them
  1. the current account has 1 "product"
  2. the current account has 3 yanked "releases" for the last "product"
  3. the current account has 1 "artifact" for each "release"
  4. the current account has 1 "policy" for the last "product"
  5. the current account has 1 "license" for the last "policy"
  6. I am a license of account "test1"
  7. I use an authentication token

 'the input data at "<inputDataReference>"'

 'I validate the instance' 'the result will be <valid>']

  2. the schema at "#/2/schema"
  3. the input data at "<inputDataReference>"
  4. I generate a type for the schema
  5. I construct an instance of the schema type from the data
  6. I validate the instance
  7. the result will be <valid>

  2. the schema at "#/1/schema"
  3. the input data at "<inputDataReference>"
  4. I generate a type for the schema
  5. I construct an instance of the schema type from the data
  6. I validate the instance
  7. the result will be <valid>

 "header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'"
 "header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'"
 "header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'"
 "header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDAuth/v1'"
 'method post' 'status 200']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, senza prima aver mai prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern ID_AUTH
  1. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3' })
  2. header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  3. header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  4. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  5. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDAuth/v1'
  6. method post
  7. status 200
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che non arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, test che non prevede un errore in questo caso durante la gestione del rate limiting poichè definita una proprietà 'pdnd.rateLimitingByOrganization.infoNotAvailable.abortTransaction' che disattiva l'errore
  1. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3' })
  2. header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  3. header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  4. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01ExampleClient3'
  5. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDRateLimitingSenzaPDNDOrganization/v1'
  6. method post
  7. status 200
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che non arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, test che non prevede un errore nonostante il recupero delle informazioni non sia andato a buon fine (NOTA: nella govwayMonitor si vede la risoluzione solamente perche' e' lo stesso clientId usato e gia' risolto; ma dentro al token (usato dalla trasformazione che genera l'header 'PDND-ExternalId') le info non ci sono)
  1. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })
  2. header simulazionepdnd-username = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  3. header simulazionepdnd-password = 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  4. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  5. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDFallito/v1'
  6. method post
  7. status 200

  7. status 200

['the parties place the following orders:'

 'the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"'
 'the parties should have the following account balances:'
 'the network moves ahead "2" epochs'
 'the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"'
 'the parties should have the following account balances:']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/liquidity-provision/0044-LIME-092.feature · An LP with ask orders outside valid range during auction is penalised (0044-LIME-094)
  1. the parties place the following orders:
  2. the network moves ahead "1" epochs
  3. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"
  4. the parties should have the following account balances:
  5. the network moves ahead "2" epochs
  6. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"
  7. the parties should have the following account balances:
vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/liquidity-provision/0044-LIME-092.feature · An LP with bid orders inside valid range during auction (and market has no indicative price), is not penalised (0044-LIME-092)
  1. the parties place the following orders:
  2. the network moves ahead "1" epochs
  3. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"
  4. the parties should have the following account balances:
  5. the network moves ahead "2" epochs
  6. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "ETH/JAN23"
  7. the parties should have the following account balances:
vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/liquidity-provision/0044-LIME-119.feature · An LP with ask orders outside valid range during auction is penalised (0044-LIME-114)
  1. the parties place the following orders:

  3. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "BTC/ETH"
  4. the parties should have the following account balances:
  5. the network moves ahead "2" epochs
  6. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_MONITORING_AUCTION" for the market "BTC/ETH"
  7. the parties should have the following account balances:

Canonical step text

['def jobProfileId = createJobProfileId'
 "call read(utilFeature+'@ImportRecord') { fileName:'FAT-1124', jobName:'customJob' }"
 "match status != 'ERROR'"
 "call read(completeExecutionFeature) { key: '#(sourcePath)'}"
 'def jobExecution = response' "assert jobExecution.status == 'COMMITTED'"
 "assert jobExecution.uiStatus == 'RUNNING_COMPLETE'"
 'assert jobExecution.progress.current == 1']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

folio-org_folio-integration-tests data-import/src/main/resources/folijet/data-import/features/marc-records/marc-bibs/match/FAT-1124.feature · FAT-1124 Test import with static match on Holdings permanent location with different format
  1. def jobProfileId = createJobProfileId
  2. call read(utilFeature+'@ImportRecord') { fileName:'FAT-1124', jobName:'customJob' }
  3. match status != 'ERROR'
  4. call read(completeExecutionFeature) { key: '#(sourcePath)'}
  5. def jobExecution = response
  6. assert jobExecution.status == 'COMMITTED'
  7. assert jobExecution.uiStatus == 'RUNNING_COMPLETE'
  8. assert jobExecution.progress.current == 1
folio-org_folio-integration-tests data-import/src/main/resources/folijet/data-import/features/marc-records/marc-bibs/match/FAT-13520.feature · FAT-13520 Match MARC-to-Instance by Cancelled LCCN and update Instance
  1. def jobProfileId = createInstanceJobProfileId
  2. call read(utilFeature+'@ImportRecord') { fileName:'FAT-13520', jobName:'customJob' }
  3. match status != 'ERROR'
  4. call read(completeExecutionFeature) { key: '#(sourcePath)'}
  5. def jobExecution = response
  6. assert jobExecution.status == 'COMMITTED'
  7. assert jobExecution.uiStatus == 'RUNNING_COMPLETE'
  8. assert jobExecution.progress.current == 1
folio-org_folio-integration-tests data-import/src/main/resources/folijet/data-import/features/marc-records/marc-bibs/match/FAT-13521.feature · FAT-13521_1 Update of file using marc-to-marc match by 010$z
  1. def jobProfileId = createInstanceJobProfileId
  2. call read(utilFeature+'@ImportRecord') { fileName:'FAT-13521_1', jobName:'customJob' }
  3. match status != 'ERROR'
  4. call read(completeExecutionFeature) { key: '#(sourcePath)'}
  5. def jobExecution = response
  6. assert jobExecution.status == 'COMMITTED'
  7. assert jobExecution.uiStatus == 'RUNNING_COMPLETE'
  8. assert jobExecution.progress.current == 1

['XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value 10.1.1.1 on XPath //*[local-name()=\'xa-datasource-property\'][@name="ServerName"]'
 'XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value 3306 on XPath //*[local-name()=\'xa-datasource-property\'][@name="Port"]'
 'XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value kitchensink on XPath //*[local-name()=\'xa-datasource-property\'][@name="DatabaseName"]'
 "XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value marek on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='user-name']"
 "XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value hardtoguess on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='password']"
 "XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value java:jboss/datasources/test_mysql on XPath //*[local-name()='default-bindings']/@datasource"
 'container log should not contain WARN The default datasource for the ee subsystem has been guessed to be']

jboss-container-images_jboss-eap-7-openshift-image eap-xp3/tests/features/datasource.feature · check mysql datasource
  1. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value 10.1.1.1 on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource-property'][@name="ServerName"]
  2. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value 3306 on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource-property'][@name="Port"]
  3. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value kitchensink on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource-property'][@name="DatabaseName"]
  4. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value marek on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='user-name']
  5. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value hardtoguess on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='password']
  6. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value java:jboss/datasources/test_mysql on XPath //*[local-name()='default-bindings']/@datasource
  7. container log should not contain WARN The default datasource for the ee subsystem has been guessed to be

  3. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain trimmed value kitchensink on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='xa-datasource-property'][@name="DatabaseName"]
  4. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value marek on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='user-name']

Canonical step text

['the current account has 1 "license" for the second "user" as "owner"'
 'the current account has 1 "machine" for the last "license"'
 'the current account has 1 "process" for the last "machine"'
 'I am a user of account "test1"' 'I use an authentication token'
 'I send a GET request to "/accounts/test1/machines/$0/processes/$0"'
 'the response status should be "200"']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

keygen-sh_keygen-api features/api/v1/machines/relationships/processes.feature · User retrieves a machine's process (license owner)
  1. the current account has 1 "license" for the second "user" as "owner"
  2. the current account has 1 "machine" for the last "license"
  3. the current account has 1 "process" for the last "machine"
  4. I am a user of account "test1"
  5. I use an authentication token
  6. I send a GET request to "/accounts/test1/machines/$0/processes/$0"
  7. the response status should be "200"
keygen-sh_keygen-api features/api/v1/machines/relationships/processes.feature · User retrieves the processes for their machine (license owner)
  1. the current account has 1 "license" for the last "user" as "owner"
  2. the current account has 1 "machine" for the last "license"
  3. the current account has 3 "processes" for the last "machine"
  4. I am a user of account "test1"
  5. I use an authentication token
  6. I send a GET request to "/accounts/test1/machines/$0/processes"
  7. the response status should be "200"
keygen-sh_keygen-api features/api/v1/machines/relationships/processes.feature · User retrieves the processes for their machine (license user)
  1. the current account has 1 "license-user" for the last "license" and the last "user"
  2. the current account has 1 "machine" for the last "license"
  3. the current account has 3 "processes" for the last "machine"
  4. I am a user of account "test1"
  5. I use an authentication token
  6. I send a GET request to "/accounts/test1/machines/$0/processes"
  7. the response status should be "200"

['status 200' "match response == read('response.json')"
 "match header Authorization == '#notpresent'"
 'def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token\'][0], "Bearer")'
 'def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token\'][0], "AGID")'
 'def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token\'][0], "AGID")'
 'def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/audit.feature · Giro Ok con informazioni utente passate nella query url <tipo-test> pattern:<sicurezzaPattern> audit:<auditPattern> (<descrizione>)
  1. status 200
  2. match response == read('response.json')
  3. match header Authorization == '#notpresent'
  4. def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token'][0], "Bearer")
  5. def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token'][0], "AGID")
  6. def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token'][0], "AGID")
  7. def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/audit.feature · Giro Ok con informazioni utente passate nella query url <tipo-test> pattern:<sicurezzaPattern> audit:<auditPattern> e audit spedito come array (<descrizione>)
  1. status 200
  2. match response == read('response.json')
  3. match header Authorization == '#notpresent'
  4. def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token'][0], "Bearer")
  5. def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token'][0], "AGID")
  6. def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token'][0], "AGID")
  7. def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest

Canonical step text

['request read("request.xml")'
 "header Content-Type = 'application/soap+xml'" 'header action = soap_url'
 "header GovWay-TestSuite-Test-ID = 'connettivita-base'"
 "header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })"
 'method post' 'status 200' 'match response == read("response.xml")']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/soap/sicurezza-messaggio/idas01.feature · Test connettività base
  1. request read("request.xml")
  2. header Content-Type = 'application/soap+xml'
  3. header action = soap_url
  4. header GovWay-TestSuite-Test-ID = 'connettivita-base'
  5. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })
  6. method post
  7. status 200
  8. match response == read("response.xml")
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/soap/sicurezza-messaggio/idas02.feature · IDAS02 - Test con criteri autorizzativi per contenuto (es. security token)
  1. request read("request.xml")
  2. header Content-Type = 'application/soap+xml'
  3. header action = soap_url
  4. header GovWay-TestSuite-Test-ID = 'check-authz-idas02'
  5. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })
  6. method post
  7. status 200
  8. match response == read("response.xml")
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/soap/sicurezza-messaggio/idas02.feature · Il token viene riutilizzato, fruizione ed erogazione devono arrabbiarsi
  1. request read("request.xml")
  2. header Content-Type = 'application/soap+xml'
  3. header action = soap_url
  4. header GovWay-TestSuite-Test-ID = 'connettivita-base-idas02'
  5. header Authorization = call basic ({ username: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01', password: 'ApplicativoBlockingIDA01' })
  6. method post
  7. status 200
  8. match response == read("response.xml")

Canonical step text

['execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs21"'
 'check resultsets "join_rs2" and "join_rs21" are same in following columns'
 'execute sql in "dble-1" and the result should be consistent with mysql'
 'execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs3"'
 'check resultset "join_rs3" has lines with following column values']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

actiontech_dble-test-suite behave_dble/features/func_test/sql_plan/hint_ruleBCD_1.feature · rule B, C, D -> shardingTable + shardingTable + shardingTable -> left join & left join #1
  1. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs21"
  2. check resultsets "join_rs2" and "join_rs21" are same in following columns
  3. execute sql in "dble-1" and the result should be consistent with mysql
  4. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs3"
  5. check resultset "join_rs3" has lines with following column values
actiontech_dble-test-suite behave_dble/features/func_test/sql_plan/hint_ruleBCD_1.feature · rule B, C, D -> shardingTable + shardingTable + singleTable -> left join & left join #2
  1. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs21"
  2. check resultsets "join_rs2" and "join_rs21" are same in following columns
  3. execute sql in "dble-1" and the result should be consistent with mysql
  4. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs3"
  5. check resultset "join_rs3" has lines with following column values
actiontech_dble-test-suite behave_dble/features/func_test/sql_plan/hint_ruleBCD_2.feature · rule B, C, D -> shardingTable + shardingTable + shardingTable -> left join & inner join #1
  1. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs21"
  2. check resultsets "join_rs2" and "join_rs21" are same in following columns
  3. execute sql in "dble-1" and the result should be consistent with mysql
  4. execute single sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode and save resultset in "join_rs3"
  5. check resultset "join_rs3" has lines with following column values

  2. header simulazionepdnd-purposeId = 'purposeId-ApplicativoBlockingIDA01'
  3. header simulazionepdnd-audience = 'TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDFallito/v1'
  4. method post
  5. status 200

vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/liquidity-provision/0044-LIME-088.feature · 001: If a liquidity provider has `fraction_of_time_on_book` = `0.3`, `market.liquidity.commitmentMinTimeFraction = 0.6`, `market.liquidity.sla.nonPerformanceBondPenaltySlope = 0.7`, `market.liquidity.sla.nonPerformanceBondPenaltyMax = 0.6`and the market parameter change `market.liquidity.commitmentMinTimeFraction = 0.3` is enacted during the epoch then at the end of the current epoch LP will have their bond slashed. If the LP has `fraction_of_time_on_book` = `0.3` at the end of the next epoch, they are meeting their commitment and will not forfeit any of their bond stake. (0044-LIME-088)
  1. the parties submit the following liquidity provision:
  2. the network moves ahead "1" blocks
  3. the parties place the following orders:
  4. the opening auction period ends for market "ETH/MAR22"
  5. the following trades should be executed:

  3. the parties place the following orders:
  4. the opening auction period ends for market "ETH/JAN23"
  5. the following trades should be executed:
vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/liquidity-provision/0044-LIME-092.feature · An LP with bid orders inside valid range during auction (and market has no indicative price), is not penalised (0044-LIME-092)
  1. the parties submit the following liquidity provision:
  2. the network moves ahead "2" blocks
  3. the parties place the following orders:

  5. the following trades should be executed:

  5. request read('request.json')

  1. def formatterHHmm = java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("HHmm");
  2. def formattedDateHHmm = today.format(formatterHHmm)
  3. url govway_base_path + "/rest/out/DemoSoggettoFruitore/DemoSoggettoErogatore/TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDAuth/v1"
  4. path 'test'
  5. request read('request.json')

L'invocazione fallisce perchè il token non è valido.

  2. def formattedDate = today.format(formatter)

  5. request read('request.json')

 "XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value hardtoguess on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='password']"
 "XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value java:jboss/datasources/test_mysql on XPath //*[local-name()='default-bindings']/@datasource"

  3. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value hardtoguess on XPath //*[local-name()='xa-datasource']/*[local-name()='security']/*[local-name()='password']
  4. XML file /opt/eap/standalone/configuration/standalone-openshift.xml should contain value java:jboss/datasources/test_mysql on XPath //*[local-name()='default-bindings']/@datasource
  5. container log should not contain WARN The default datasource for the ee subsystem has been guessed to be

Canonical step text

["match header Authorization == '#notpresent'"
 'def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token\'][0], "Bearer")'
 'def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token\'][0], "AGID")'
 'def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders[\'GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token\'][0], "AGID")'
 'def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/audit.feature · Giro Ok con informazioni utente passate nella query url <tipo-test> pattern:<sicurezzaPattern> audit:<auditPattern> (<descrizione>)
  1. match header Authorization == '#notpresent'
  2. def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token'][0], "Bearer")
  3. def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token'][0], "AGID")
  4. def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token'][0], "AGID")
  5. def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/audit.feature · Giro Ok con informazioni utente passate nella query url <tipo-test> pattern:<sicurezzaPattern> audit:<auditPattern> e audit spedito come array (<descrizione>)
  1. match header Authorization == '#notpresent'
  2. def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token'][0], "Bearer")
  3. def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token'][0], "AGID")
  4. def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token'][0], "AGID")
  5. def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest
link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/audit.feature · Giro Ok con informazioni utente statiche; <tipo-test> pattern:<sicurezzaPattern> audit:<auditPattern> (<descrizione>)
  1. match header Authorization == '#notpresent'
  2. def client_authorization_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Authorization-Token'][0], "Bearer")
  3. def client_integrity_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Integrity-Token'][0], "AGID")
  4. def client_audit_token = decode_token(responseHeaders['GovWay-TestSuite-GovWay-Client-Audit-Token'][0], "AGID")
  5. def request_digest = get client_integrity_token $.payload.signed_headers..digest

Canonical step text

['def formattedDateYYYYMMDD = today.format(formatterYYYYMMDD)'
 'def formatterHHmm = java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("HHmm");'
 'def formattedDateHHmm = today.format(formatterHHmm)'
 'url govway_base_path + "/rest/out/DemoSoggettoFruitore/DemoSoggettoErogatore/TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDIntegrity/v1"'
 "path 'test'"]

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

link-it_govway protocolli/modipa/testsuite/src/test/rest/sicurezza-messaggio/getInformazioniPdnd.feature · Test che arricchisce le informazioni sul client prelevandole dalla PDND, prima però viene prelevata la chiave essendo solamente un pattern INTEGRITY con truststore PDND
  1. def formattedDateYYYYMMDD = today.format(formatterYYYYMMDD)
  2. def formatterHHmm = java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("HHmm");
  3. def formattedDateHHmm = today.format(formatterHHmm)
  4. url govway_base_path + "/rest/out/DemoSoggettoFruitore/DemoSoggettoErogatore/TestRecuperoInformazioniPDNDIntegrity/v1"
  5. path 'test'

 'check general log in host "mysql-slave2" has not "select id from table_1"'

  7. check general log in host "mysql-slave1" has not "select age from table_1"
  8. check general log in host "mysql-slave2" has "select age from table_1"
actiontech_dble-test-suite behave_dble/features/func_test/local_read/local_read_rwsplit.feature · bootstrap.cnf and db.xml set district and dataCenter #3
  1. check general log in host "mysql-slave1" has "select id from table_3"
  2. check general log in host "mysql-slave2" has not "select id from table_3"
  3. add xml segment to node with attribute "{'tag':'root'}" in "db.xml"
  4. execute admin cmd "reload @@config_all"
  5. execute sql in "dble-1" in "user" mode
  6. check general log in host "mysql-master2" has not "select age from table_3"
  7. check general log in host "mysql-slave1" has "select age from table_3"
  8. check general log in host "mysql-slave2" has not "select age from table_3"

coreshop_CoreShop features/domain/cart/cart_base_item_taxes.feature · Create a new cart and add a product and calculate item totals
  1. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted retail-price with "4800" including tax
  2. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted retail-price with "4000" excluding tax
  3. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have retail-price with "2400" including tax
  4. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have retail-price with "2000" excluding tax
  5. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted total with "4800" including tax
  6. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted total with "4000" excluding tax
  7. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have total with "2400" including tax
coreshop_CoreShop features/domain/cart/cart_base_item_taxes.feature · Create a new cart and add a product with a price rule and calculate item totals
  1. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have discount with "480" including tax
  2. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have discount with "400" excluding tax
  3. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted discount with "960" including tax
  4. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted discount with "800" excluding tax
  5. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have retail-price with "2400" including tax
  6. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have retail-price with "2000" excluding tax
  7. the cart item with product "T-Shirt" should have converted retail-price with "4800" including tax

folio-org_folio-integration-tests mod-oai-pmh/src/test/resources/firebird/oaipmh/oaipmh-listRecords-additional.feature · harvest suppressed record for marc21_withholdings - check data fields
  1. path 'holdings-storage/holdings', holdingsId
  2. header Accept = 'text/plain'
  3. header x-okapi-token = okapitoken
  4. def holding = read('classpath:samples/holding.json')
  5. set holding._version = 7
  6. set holding.id = holdingsId
  7. set holding.instanceId = '62ca5b43-0f11-40af-a6b4-1a9ee2db33cb'
  8. set holding.hrid = 'inst000000000145'

['the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_NO_TRADING" for the market "ETH/DEC23"'
 'the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC19"'
 'the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC20"'
 'the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC21"'
 'the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC22"'
 'the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC23"'
 'the global insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the asset "ETH"']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/settlement/insurance-pools-at-settlement.feature · Check insurance pool balances when markets are settled in a variety of ways, at different points in time
  1. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_NO_TRADING" for the market "ETH/DEC23"
  2. the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC19"
  3. the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC20"
  4. the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC21"
  5. the insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the market "ETH/DEC22"
  6. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC23"
  7. the global insurance pool balance should be "1000000" for the asset "ETH"
vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/successor-markets-insurance.feature · Test global insurance pool collects successor and parent markets balances: parent, successor leave opening auction, successor is canceled.
  1. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_CONTINUOUS" for the market "ETH/DEC21"
  2. the insurance pool balance should be "500" for the market "ETH/DEC19"
  3. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC20"
  4. the insurance pool balance should be "1500" for the market "ETH/DEC21"
  5. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC22"
  6. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC23"
  7. the global insurance pool balance should be "3000" for the asset "USD"
vegaprotocol_vega core/integration/features/successor-markets-insurance.feature · Test global insurance pool collects successor and parent markets balances: parent, successor leave opening auction, successor is settled.
  1. the trading mode should be "TRADING_MODE_CONTINUOUS" for the market "ETH/DEC21"
  2. the insurance pool balance should be "500" for the market "ETH/DEC19"
  3. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC20"
  4. the insurance pool balance should be "1500" for the market "ETH/DEC21"
  5. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC22"
  6. the insurance pool balance should be "0" for the market "ETH/DEC23"
  7. the global insurance pool balance should be "3000" for the asset "USD"

Canonical step text

['I perform a HTTP "POST" request to "/queues" with headers "Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984":'
 'I should see a response status code of "400" "Bad Request"'
 'I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"'
 'I should see a "Content-Length" header value "180"'
 'I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"'
 'I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "c08de32879ee5fa70b4faf9a4241c679"'
 'I should see a "Connection" header value "close"']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

  4. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "180"
  5. I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"
  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "c08de32879ee5fa70b4faf9a4241c679"
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"

 'I should see a response status code of "415" "Unsupported Media Type"'
 'I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"'
 'I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"'
 'I should see a "Content-Length" header value "263"'

 'every active "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned']

  3. all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique

  5. every active "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned

 'I should see a response status code of "400" "Bad Request"'
 'I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"'
 'I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"'
 'I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"'
 'I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "0e30dab4c73bb453986e69517cd5a953"'
 'I should see a "Connection" header value "close"']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

Corvusoft_restq test/acceptance/features/client_side_identifiers.feature · Invalid queue key.
  1. I perform a HTTP "POST" request to "/queues" with headers "Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984":
  2. I should see a response status code of "400" "Bad Request"
  3. I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"
  4. I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"
  5. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"
  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "0e30dab4c73bb453986e69517cd5a953"
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"
Corvusoft_restq test/acceptance/features/client_side_identifiers.feature · Invalid subscription key.
  1. I perform a HTTP "POST" request to "/subscriptions" with headers "Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984":
  2. I should see a response status code of "400" "Bad Request"
  3. I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"
  4. I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"
  5. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "168"
  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value "0e30dab4c73bb453986e69517cd5a953"
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"
Corvusoft_restq test/acceptance/features/client_side_identifiers.feature · Mixed case queue key.
  1. I perform a HTTP "GET" request to "/queues/2b010093-315d-4af0-9d6b-9bf65f8c0b05" with headers "Accept: application/json, Host: localhost:1984"
  2. I should see a response status code of "200" "OK"
  3. I should see a "Server" header value "corvusoft/restq"
  4. I should see a "Content-Type" header value "application/json; charset=utf-8"
  5. I should see a "Content-Length" header value "336"
  6. I should see a "Content-MD5" header value
  7. I should see a "Connection" header value "close"

Canonical step text

['every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned'
 'at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"'
 'at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"'
 'a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored'
 'all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique'
 'all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique'
 'every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired']

Example call sites (up to 3 distinct repo/file/scenario)

local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/create_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is created
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned
  2. at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  4. a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored
  5. all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique
  6. all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique
  7. every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired
local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/delete_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is deleted
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned
  2. at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  4. a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored
  5. all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique
  6. all "secrets manager" "secret" version identifiers are unique
  7. every deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with an open recovery window can still be restored or expired
local-web-services_local-web-services lang/specification/core/informal/secretsmanager/describe_secret.feature · a "secrets manager" "secret" is described
  1. every "ACTIVE" "secrets manager" "secret" has a current version assigned
  2. at most one current version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  3. at most one previous version exists per "secrets manager" "secret"
  4. a deleted "secrets manager" "secret" with a closed recovery window cannot be restored
  5. all "secrets manager" "secret" names are unique
